message:
fix(ufunc): use idiomatic contains() for shift operation bounds checking

Replace manual comparison (b < 0 || b >= 64) with (0..64).contains(&b)
for LeftShift and RightShift bounds validation in apply_binary_op_i64,
improving clarity without changing behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
